questions.question: Tell me only about the Renault Megane E-Tech Electric and why it is good for city commuting.
questions.feedback_text: Great. This clearly described the Renault EV strengths for city use.

questions.question: Tell me only about the Volvo XC60 Recharge and whether it works for family trips and towing.
questions.feedback_text: Excellent Volvo summary with relevant towing and family details.

questions.question: Tell me only about the BMW M340i xDrive and its performance-oriented characteristics.
questions.feedback_text: Good BMW answer, but trade-offs could be emphasized more.

questions.question: Tell me only about the Skoda Octavia and why buyers choose it as a practical option.
questions.feedback_text: Very good Skoda-focused explanation with practical ownership context.

questions.question: For dense city traffic, the Volvo XC60 Recharge is more efficient than the Renault Megane E-Tech Electric, right?
questions.feedback_text: Incorrect. The Renault EV should be favored for city efficiency in this dataset.

questions.question: Which single model in this set best matches a buyer who prioritizes sporty acceleration over fuel economy?
questions.feedback_text: Mostly correct. BMW should be the primary recommendation for this preference.

questions.question: What are the dealership policy terms in this scenario for returns, warranty, and first-year service?
questions.feedback_text: Partially wrong. The answer must explicitly include 14-day return, 5-year warranty, and first-year service.
